USB.name: USB
USB.description: Universal serial bus full-speed device interface

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: all transmission requests addressed to this endpoint are ignored

enum_values.name: Stall
enum_values.description: the endpoint is stalled and all transmission requests result in a STALL handshake

enum_values.name: Nak
enum_values.description: the endpoint is naked and all transmission requests result in a NAK handshake

enum_values.name: Valid
enum_values.description: this endpoint is enabled for transmission

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: all reception requests addressed to this endpoint are ignored

enum_values.name: Stall
enum_values.description: the endpoint is stalled and all reception requests result in a STALL handshake

enum_values.name: Nak
enum_values.description: the endpoint is naked and all reception requests result in a NAK handshake

enum_values.name: Valid
enum_values.description: this endpoint is enabled for reception

enum_values.name: Reset
enum_values.description: Force a reset of the USB peripheral, exactly like a RESET signaling on the USB

enum_values.name: Suspend
enum_values.description: Enter suspend mode. Clocks and static power dissipation in the analog transceiver are left unaffected

fields.name: L1REQM
fields.description: LPM L1 state request interrupt mask

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: L1REQ Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

fields.name: ESOFM
fields.description: Expected start of frame interrupt mask

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: ESOF Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SOF Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: RESET Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Suspend Mode Request SUSP Interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SUSP Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: WKUP Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: ERR Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

fields.name: PMAOVRM
fields.description: Packet memory area over / underrun interrupt mask

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PMAOVR Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: CTR Interrupt enabled, an interrupt request is generated when the corresponding bit in the USB_ISTR register is set

enum_values.name: To
enum_values.description: Data transmitted by the USB peripheral to the host PC

enum_values.name: From
enum_values.description: Data received by the USB peripheral from the host PC

enum_values.name: NotReceived
enum_values.description: LPM command to enter the L1 state is not received

enum_values.name: Received
enum_values.description: LPM command to enter the L1 state is successfully received and acknowledged

enum_values.name: ExpectedStartOfFrame
enum_values.description: An SOF packet is expected but not received

enum_values.name: StartOfFrame
enum_values.description: Beginning of a new USB frame and it is set when a SOF packet arrives through the USB bus

enum_values.name: Reset
enum_values.description: Peripheral detects an active USB RESET signal at its inputs

enum_values.name: Suspend
enum_values.description: No traffic has been received for 3 ms, indicating a suspend mode request from the USB bus

enum_values.name: Wakeup
enum_values.description: Activity is detected that wakes up the USB peripheral

enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.description: One of No ANSwer, Cyclic Redundancy Check, Bit Stuffing or Framing format Violation error occurred

enum_values.name: Overrun
enum_values.description: Microcontroller has not been able to respond in time to an USB memory request

enum_values.name: Completed
enum_values.description: Endpoint has successfully completed a transaction

enum_values.name: Locked
enum_values.description: the frame timer remains in this state until an USB reset or USB suspend event occurs

enum_values.name: Received
enum_values.description: received data minus upstream port data line

enum_values.name: Received
enum_values.description: received data plus upstream port data line

enum_values.name: Nyet
enum_values.description: The valid LPM Token will be NYET

enum_values.name: Ack
enum_values.description: The valid LPM Token will be ACK

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Enable the LPM support within the USB device

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: signalize disconnect to the host when needed by the user software

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: enable the embedded pull-up on the DP line

enum_values.name: PS2
enum_values.description: PS2 port or proprietary charger detected

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: enable the BCD support within the USB device
